text.content:
Follower Rules

This journal outlines the intended use of the module while the Followers tab is being built out.

Use Case

  • Track hirelings, retainers, servants, guards, and other non-primary companions tied to a character.
  • Keep follower information attached to the owning character instead of scattering notes across loose journals.

Planned Data

  • Name or label
  • Role or type
  • Headcount
  • Pay, upkeep, or notes

Current Limitations

  • The Followers tab is currently a placeholder view.
  • No add, edit, or delete controls are available yet.
  • No automated rules enforcement is applied at this stage.

Design Direction

The module is intended to stay lightweight and sheet-focused: fast to open, easy to read, and simple to maintain during play.
